message:
feat(ufunc): add complex interleaved storage support for linalg operations

Add helper methods for complex interleaved [rows, cols, 2] storage format
and wire them into cholesky, inv, solve, solve_multi, and qr decomposition,
enabling these operations to work natively with Complex64/Complex128 dtypes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
